title: Love, Lust & Other Things
overview: The story of a recently divorced woman who goes on a journey of self discovery in order to find out what she really wants between love, sex and money. She leaves her marriage of five years to find herself. Along the way, she meets Khalid who appears to the perfect man. Things are great until a blast from the past comes tumbling in, threatening to ruin everything.
